svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-504" dy="-232" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="Dashboard — Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontColor=#666666;" value="A personal "control center" — a grid of cards. React SPA · Flask API · SQLite." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="600" x="40" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;swimlaneFillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Browser — http://localhost:5173" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="880" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="spa" parent="b" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="React SPA

App → Dashboard → Card
( CARD_REGISTRY maps source → widget )" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="340" x="270" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vite" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Vite dev server
proxies /api → 127.0.0.1:5001" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="330" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=40;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;swimlaneFillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Flask API — 127.0.0.1:5001 ( app factory · blueprints under /api )" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="880" x="40" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cards" parent="api" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="/api/cards

card records (CRUD)
list · create · update · delete" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="240" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="todos" parent="api" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="/api/todos

todo items (CRUD)
the todo card's state" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="240" x="320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="data" parent="api" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;" value="/api/data/<source>

SERVICES dispatch table
source → service.fetch()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="240" x="600" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=middle;" value="SQLite — app.db

SQLAlchemy models:
Card · Todo
(schema via Alembic migrations)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="150" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="External APIs

Open-Meteo (weather)
NASA APOD (space)
ZenQuotes (quote)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="280" x="600" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="spa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;" target="vite" value="fetch /api/*"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="vite" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;" target="api" value="proxy → Flask :5001"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="cards" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;" target="db" value="read / write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="todos" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.7;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;" target="db" value="read / write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;" target="ext" value="fetch live data
(with fallback)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="880" x="40" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1" parent="legend" style="rounded=0;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="26" x="20" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Client (browser / SPA)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="52" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2" parent="legend" style="rounded=0;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="26" x="250" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Proxy & Flask API" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="282" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3" parent="legend" style="rounded=0;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="26" x="450" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Database (SQLite)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="482" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4" parent="legend" style="rounded=0;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="26" x="650" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="External APIs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="682" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
